headline: Dow Jones Futures: Iran Closes Strait Of Hormuz; Nvidia Near Buy Point, Watch For This SpaceX Move
summary: Dow Jones futures: Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz after the stock market rose last week on the interim deal. Nvidia is near a buy point. SpaceX stock needs this.
